---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability, workflow, or documentation improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the capability or improvement you want.

## Problem

What concrete workflow problem does this solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the shape of the change. Keep it practical.

## Alternatives Considered

List other options you evaluated, even if briefly.

## Validation Or Adoption Signal

Explain how we would know this is successful: affected workflow, docs impact, tests, or user outcome.

## Additional Context

Add examples, references, or related issues if needed.
